title: 我在上网课
description_uz: «So'nggi paytda nima o'rganyapsan?» — onlayn ta'lim haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog onlayn darslar (Duolingo), onlayn va oflayn farqi, dars davomiyligi, o'qituvchilar, natija va narxni muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. O'qish mavzusidagi foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Что ты сейчас изучаешь?» — разговор об онлайн-обучении. Диалог тренирует, как обсудить онлайн-занятия (Duolingo), разницу онлайн и офлайн, длительность урока, преподавателей, результат и цену. Полезная лексика об учёбе — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «What are you studying lately?» — a chat about online learning. This dialogue practices talking about online classes (Duolingo), online vs in-person, lesson length, teachers, results, and price. Useful study vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì jìn zài xué shén me?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài shàng wǎng kè, xué Yīng yǔ.
sentences.text_translation: Onlayn darslarga qatnashyapman, ingliz tilini o'rganyapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я учусь на онлайн-курсах, учу английский.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm taking online classes, studying English.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xiàn shàng kè chéng ma? Zài nǎr shàng?
sentences.text_translation_en: Online courses? Where do you take them?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 在一个学习软件上，叫多邻国。
sentences.pinyin: Zài yí ge xué xí ruǎn jiàn shàng, jiào Duō lín guó.
sentences.text_translation: Bir o'quv ilovasida, Duolingo deb ataladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В одном обучающем приложении, называется Duolingo.
sentences.text_translation_en: On a learning app called Duolingo.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 线上课程和线下有什么不一样？
sentences.pinyin: Xiàn shàng kè chéng hé xiàn xià yǒu shén me bù yí yàng?
sentences.text_translation: Onlayn va oflayn kurslar nimasi bilan farq qiladi?
sentences.text_translation_en: How are online courses different from in-person ones?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 线上更方便，在家就能学。
sentences.pinyin: Xiàn shàng gèng fāng biàn, zài jiā jiù néng xué.
sentences.text_translation: Onlayn qulayroq, uyda o'tirib o'rganish mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_en: Online is more convenient — you can study at home.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yì jié kè duō cháng shí jiān?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 二十分钟左右，不会太累。
sentences.pinyin: Èr shí fēn zhōng zuǒ yòu, bú huì tài lèi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Около двадцати минут, не сильно устаёшь.
sentences.text_translation_en: About twenty minutes — it's not too tiring.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 老师是中国人还是外国人？
sentences.pinyin: Lǎo shī shì Zhōng guó rén hái shì wài guó rén?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are the teachers Chinese or foreign?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有中国老师，也有外国老师。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu Zhōng guó lǎo shī, yě yǒu wài guó lǎo shī.
sentences.text_translation: Xitoylik o'qituvchilar ham, chet ellik o'qituvchilar ham bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть и китайские учителя, и иностранные.
sentences.text_translation_en: There are Chinese teachers and foreign teachers.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jué de yǒu xiào guǒ ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu, wǒ de kǒu yǔ hǎo duō le.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть, моя разговорная речь стала намного лучше.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes — my speaking has gotten much better.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng shì shi, duō shao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Men ham sinab ko'rmoqchiman, qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу попробовать, сколько стоит?
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to try it too — how much is it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yí ge yuè yì bǎi kuài, hěn pián yi.
sentences.text_translation: Oyiga bir yuz yuan, juda arzon.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сто юаней в месяц, очень дёшево.
sentences.text_translation_en: A hundred yuan a month — very cheap.
sentences.speaker: B
